rounds.prompt: The Berlin Wall falls after weeks of mass protests across East Germany.
rounds.revealFact: Crowds began tearing down sections of the wall on the night of November 9, 1989; Germany formally reunified less than a year later.

rounds.revealFact: Painted by Leonardo da Vinci in the early 1500s, it has hung in the Louvre since 1797.
